name: HKE Holdings Limited
summary: HKE Holdings Limited provides design and building services for hospitals and clinics in Singapore. The company offers radiation shielding works, M&E works, and fitting-out works; maintenance and other services, which include conducting examinations, replacement of parts, and repair works; and ancillary services, such as minor renovation and installation works, dismantling and disposal of used medical equipment, removal of construction waste materials, and cleaning of the work sites upon completion of building works. It also sells tools and materials, such as fabricated radiation shielding products, signage boards, lead sheets, and lead glass. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. HKE Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Eagle Fortitude Limited.
